top_signals.title: 7-Eleven confirms data breach claimed by the ShinyHunters gang
top_signals.summary: Convenience store chain giant 7-Eleven confirmed that its systems were breached in a cyberattack claimed by the ShinyHunters extortion group last month. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
